title: Warm-Wilted Argentinian Beans Stew
description: A savory and romantic Argentinean dish featuring English mustard and wilty beans that are light in texture and flavor profile. Perfect for a romantic dinner or evening snack.

ingredients.name: 300g green beans, trimmed and halved
ingredients.notes: Wilted for a rich flavor profile

ingredients.name: 1 tsp English mustard powder
ingredients.notes: Adds depth and tang to the dish

ingredients.name: Water or vegetable broth as needed

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
Add onions and garlic, cooking until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Toss in halved green beans with water or vegetable broth to cover them. Bring to a boil then reduce heat and let simmer for 20-25 minutes or until the beans are wilted but still tender.
Stir in English mustard powder and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve warm, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
